title: compose 6d constraint-aware custom file contract (v1.8)
$comment: v1.8 constraint-aware downstream handoff intermediate format. Four forces: force1=collab structured output, force2=downstream contract, force3=user original constraints/reference grammar, force4=agent design review advice derived from artifact scoring. Kind-agnostic: blocks[].zones[] generalizes slides/document/diagram. downstreamPayload(v1.6) remains fallback for unconstrained scenarios. lockLevel enum mirrors taskstate.schema.json #/$defs/lockLevel; validate.py self checks both stay identical.

material.$comment: One force1 content unit, with provenance.

origin.$comment: raw=user-provided text; derived=collab processed output; template=fixed template text

zone.$comment: A fillable zone inside a block. text and boundMaterialId are alternatives.

locked.$comment: Zone-level lock. true means this zone text must not be changed. Takes precedence over package-level lockLevel.

block.$comment: Kind-agnostic container: one slide, one document section, or one diagram group.

constraints.$comment: Force3: original user constraints. lockedZones/forbidden are hard redlines; softGuidance is semantic direction.

softGuidance.$comment: Directional constraints, e.g. 'tech feel but not cold'

referenceArtifact.$comment: Optional source artifact supplied by the user as a style/layout reference. The artifact is read for reusable design grammar, not copied as content.

kind.$comment: Original or converted reference artifact type.

sourceRef.$comment: File path, attachment id, or internal scratch id for the reference artifact.

usage.$comment: How the reference is allowed to influence the new output.

assetId.$comment: v1.9: if this reference comes from a stored library asset, its durableAsset.id (taskstate memory.assets[]). When set, the slidesProfile is loaded from .collab/assets/ instead of re-extracted; a freshly extracted deck is stored and its id backfilled here.

styleProfile.$comment: Reusable design grammar extracted from a reference deck. Keep observations operational: what downstream must do or avoid.

reusePolicy.$comment: Default is interpret-not-copy unless the user owns the deck/template and asks for exact reuse.

imitationBoundaries.$comment: Hard IP/privacy line: logos, confidential numbers, private names, unique original artwork that must NOT be copied. Each entry MUST also be projected into constraints.forbidden so the downstream verification gate enforces it as an exact-match force3 redline (06-interaction-compose 5c). This array alone is advisory; constraints.forbidden is what gets checked.

scoreItem.$comment: One scored design-audit dimension. This is downstream artifact scoring, not the main quality-gate.

dimension.$comment: Huashu-style PPT/design rubric dimensions, kept as ASCII enum.

designReview.$comment: Force4: agent-owned design recommendation generated from scored downstream artifact review. Enterprise render-engine keeps it advisory-only; personal co-creator may write it back as soft guidance.

scores.$comment: Per-dimension diagnosis only. There is deliberately NO overallScore: a single rolled-up number invites 'score decides the gate' drift and a weighted formula, both of which violate the binary-gate / no-scoring invariant. The verdict lives in agentSuggestion, not a number.

agentSuggestion.$comment: Operational suggestion produced by the agent from the scoring result.

influencePolicy.$comment: advisory-only=show/record suggestion but do not rewrite customFile; soft-force4=append to constraints.softGuidance; force4-locked=only when user explicitly approves locking the advice.

diagnosticChain.$comment: Logic chain from preflight/tool-fit detection and artifact review. Used as a second validation path so Force4 does not optimize the wrong root cause.

artifactProfile.$comment: v1.9 通用产物生成契约(任意常见产物：周报/提案/纪要/简历/邮件/文档/计划/PPT…)。目标不是复刻表面格式，是提炼『生成契约』：给谁看、解决什么问题、信息怎么排序、每部分放什么、什么语气、多长、哪里不能乱写、什么算好。PPT 等视觉型产物在 visualProfile 里附带 slidesProfile 特化层。素材库内容主体；存 .collab/assets/<type>/{id}.json，customFile 经 referenceArtifact.assetId 引用。核心规则：不要描述产物长什么样，要解释如何为新用户、新情境重造一个同类的好产物。

artifactType.$comment: L0 细粒度产物定位，如 '纯文字工作周报' / '内部项目提案书'。粗类在 durableAsset.type。

reader.$comment: L0 读者：给谁看、最关心什么。

writerRole.$comment: L0 写作者在此产物里扮演的角色(员工/项目负责人/创业者…)，影响结构与语气。

structure.$comment: L1 结构骨架：每个单元 + 功能 + 是否必需 + 顺序。先说什么后说什么，哪些不能删。

unit.$comment: 如 '一句话总结' / '背景' / '决策请求'。

function.$comment: 这一段为什么存在、承担什么作用。

contentSlots.$comment: L2 信息槽：每个槽该填什么、可选什么、要避免什么。不是填空，是填有质量的信息。

fill.$comment: 该填的信息维度，如 做了什么/结果/数据/影响。

avoid.$comment: 要避免的写法，如 无结果的过程流水账。

languageProfile.$comment: L3 语言表达：纯文字产物比 PPT 更吃这层。

tone.$comment: 汇报/建议/销售/复盘口吻等。

terminology.$comment: 术语密度 + 是否需解释。

patterns.$comment: 好写法，如 动词明确、结论先行、带数字。

antiPatterns.$comment: AI 味/空话，如 '积极推进''持续优化''取得一定进展'。

densityRules.$comment: L4 信息密度：该长则长该短则短。如 '总长 400-700 字'、'完成事项 3-5 条'、'每条 1-2 句'、'问题必须带下一步'。

usageStrategy.$comment: L5+固定/可变+生成规则：让模板从『分析样例』变成『可调用』。

variable.$comment: 随用户内容/场景变化项。

removable.$comment: 不建议保留项，如长篇背景/泛泛自评。

adaptationRules.$comment: 按读者切换：领导/客户/同事/投资人/老师… 各怎么改。

generationRules.$comment: 可调用规则，如 '没数据不要硬编'、'出现延期必须写原因+下一步'。

qualityCriteria.$comment: L10 质量评估：好产物长什么样 + 常见坏产物。后续 force4/测试对标用。

visualProfile.$comment: 仅视觉型产物(PPT/deck)：附带 slide 视觉特化层(页面角色/调用索引/视觉语法)。文字产物不填。

slidesProfile.$comment: v1.9 ppt-template 的视觉特化层(挂在 artifactProfile.visualProfile 下)。产物定位/场景在 artifactProfile(L0)，这里只管 slide 视觉：L1 pageRoles + L5 slideIndex + L3 brand/function 分类 + L2/L4 视觉语法(内嵌 styleProfile)。Key rule: 不描述每页有什么，描述每页能用来干什么。

pageRoles.$comment: L1: per-slide role. Two layers — roleTag (structured, alignable) + roleText (free). keepPolicy drives reuse/delete decisions.

roleTag.$comment: L1 minimal role label; closed common set + 'other' for non-corporate decks.

roleText.$comment: L2 free description, e.g. 'this-week core KPI overview page'.

capacity.$comment: plain-language info capacity, e.g. '3 parallel short items, not long text'.

elementClasses.$comment: L3 core subset: classify elements by function; brand elements feed styleProfile.imitationBoundaries and constraints.forbidden.

brand.$comment: logo / company name / fixed footer → project into imitationBoundaries + constraints.forbidden.

slideIndex.$comment: L5: intent -> which slides. modular=false degrades gracefully (bespoke narrative deck whose pages are not reusable).

styleProfile.$comment: L2/L3/L4 visual grammar, reused from v1.8.1.

toolPlanItem.$comment: One tool in a downstream composition plan. Tools may be combined when one downstream skill cannot satisfy force1+force3 alone.

handoffPreflight.$comment: Before customFile injection: verify force1 satisfies force3, then verify force2/tool composition can carry force1+force3. If this fails, do not inject into an unsuitable downstream skill.

kind.$comment: Renderer family; same set as downstreamPayload kind.

mode.$comment: Derived record, not authority. Derived from strategy.audienceProfile: report+professional -> render-engine; create+technicalDetail<=low -> co-creator; otherwise co-creator.

lockStrategy.$comment: Initialization strategy. render-engine -> zone-first; co-creator -> level-first.

lockLevel.$comment: Package-level default constraint level, mirrors taskstate lockLevel.
